// The Profile

This Is Not
a Website.
It's a Recruitment
Instrument.

Every section is engineered for how D1, D2, and D3 coaches — and international scouts — actually evaluate prospects. Not for general audiences. Not for social media. Built for the person who decides what happens next in your athlete's career.

Coach Reach
95
SEO Visibility
88
Mobile Score
100
Load Speed
98
01
Animated Achievement Ticker
Awards, milestones, and rankings in continuous animated motion. The first thing a coach sees — and the first thing they remember.
02
Quantified Performance Stats
Years in club, competitive level, GPA, and position-specific metrics — all visualized in a format coaches evaluate in seconds.
03
Dual Contact CTA Architecture
Two contact pathways: direct athlete/family contact and coach/agent routing. Designed to generate the contact request, not just display information.
04
Video Highlights Integration
Hudl, Taka Sports, YouTube, or custom embed. Your highlight reel positioned at exactly the right moment in the coach's evaluation flow.
05
Character & Academic Narrative
A dedicated section that positions the athlete as a complete person — not just a performance profile. Coaches recruit character, not just stats.
06
NIL-Ready Architecture
Every profile is built to evolve from a recruitment tool to a brand partnership hub as the athlete's career and audience grow.
// How It Works

From Intake
to Live Profile

Five steps from your athlete's story to a recruitment instrument in front of coaches and scouts worldwide.

01
Subscribe & Intake
Complete the athlete intake form — stats, club history, academic record, target programs, and personal narrative.
02
Profile Built
Our team engineers your custom profile — no templates, no shortcuts. Delivered within 5–7 business days.
03
Review & Approve
You review the profile and request any changes. We refine until it's exactly right.
04
Go Live
Your profile publishes to a permanent URL. Share it with coaches, scouts, and programs worldwide.
05
Update Monthly
Use your 5 monthly regenerations to refresh stats, add awards, and keep your profile competitive all season.
// Pricing

One Profile.
One Price.

Get started below — or contact us to talk first.

No long-term lock-in. Profile ownership is yours forever — active subscription keeps it current and growing. Read the FAQ →

// The Stakes

The Investment
Families Make
Too Late.

$320K+
Max D1 Scholarship — 4 Years
$30K
Average Annual Training Spend
Instant
Online Delivery

Families invest $15,000–$30,000 per year in training, tournaments, and academy fees. That is a substantial, multi-year commitment to an athlete's future — yet most families lack the one asset that consolidates everything into a format coaches can evaluate in minutes.

A Division I athletic scholarship is worth $80,000–$320,000 over four years. A DBP Elite Athlete Profile is the tool that makes the scholarship conversation happen — and it is delivered in days, not months.

Coaches and scouts at top programs are discovering prospects digitally first. A polished, information-dense athlete profile is no longer a differentiator — it is the minimum viable standard for serious recruitment consideration.

“The athletes who get noticed are not always the most talented. They are the most visible, the most prepared, and the most professionally presented.”
— DBP Elite Athlete Profile · Business Proposal 2026

// FAQ

Questions
Answered.

A custom-engineered, single-page digital recruitment tool built specifically for youth soccer athletes navigating college recruitment and NIL opportunities. It includes an animated achievement ticker, quantified performance stats, character narrative, video highlights integration, and a dual-CTA architecture — all structured so a D1 coach can evaluate your athlete completely in under 90 seconds.
Everything: custom profile design and engineering, all content sections (hero, stats, character narrative, video, contact CTAs), one year of subscription access, and five profile regenerations per month. This is the full service — no hidden fees, no reduced deliverables.
A regeneration is a complete rebuild of your profile with updated data — new stats, awards, photos, or video links. You get five per month. Use them after tournament weekends, showcase events, or any time your athlete earns a new milestone worth highlighting.
Your profile stays live and accessible forever — it belongs to you. However, to update it, add new data, or access new features, you'll need to renew your subscription. Without renewal, your profile is preserved exactly as it was at the end of year one. Think of renewal as the ongoing engine that keeps your profile competitive.
Yes — NIL-readiness is built into every DBP Elite profile. Each profile includes a brand section, sponsor pitch structure, audience metrics display, and NIL deal showcase. It is not an add-on; it is a core feature designed for college athletes actively pursuing brand partnerships and for high school athletes preparing for that stage.
Families enrolled in DBP Elite partner academy clubs receive a preferred rate. Contact us or ask your club director if your academy is a DBP Elite partner.
Hudl, Taka Sports, YouTube, and custom embed links. If your highlights live on any of these platforms, we integrate them directly into your profile at the right point in the coach's evaluation flow. You don't need to move your video — we bring it in.
The athlete's parent or guardian manages all profile data, photos, video links, and regeneration requests. For youth athletes (under 18), the parent account is the authoritative owner. The profile itself belongs to the athlete and family — not to DBP, not to a platform.
Instantly. Once your intake form is submitted, your profile is generated and goes live on the platform immediately. You can generate up to 5 versions per month — use them to refresh stats after tournaments, add new awards, or update your narrative. Each version you publish also sends you a direct link to share with coaches, scouts, and recruiters for your own promotion.
Yes. Profiles are SEO-optimized and can be set to public visibility for coach and scout discovery. You control who can see your profile: private (invite only), shared link, or fully public. Coaches and scouts with free DBP Elite accounts can save and follow athletes they're tracking.
A basic website is built for general audiences. A DBP Elite Athlete Profile is engineered specifically for how D1, D2, and D3 coaches — and international scouts — evaluate prospects. Every section, every stat, every contact button is placed with one goal: generating the contact request. It is a recruitment instrument, not a digital brochure.
South Florida academy families, US national market athletes, and LATAM players targeting international programs. Each market has distinct recruitment dynamics — our profiles are calibrated for the specific coaches and scouts your athlete needs to reach.
Get Your Athlete's Profile.

Profile ownership is yours forever. Annual renewal keeps it current and growing.
